MAZU ATACHI 
Kutachika kwanloñeshelu yayiha yayuma yikutachika kutañishewa 
mumashikola, yitunakutena mu Chizungu netu Competence Based 
Curriculum (CBC), mu Lunda netu Yuma Yinakukuhwelelewa atudizi 
kwilukisha mukutaña kwawu, kunaleti kuhimpika nintañilu yakumwekesha 
kudiza kwilukisha yuma yamboka yinakukuhwelelewa kudi atudizi, 
kwesekezha namaana ayaka yamakonu. 
Iwu Mukanda Wakulombola Ntañishi hamwakutañishila atudizi akulaku 
dehi amu Fomu 1 Litilicha wunaloñeshewi kwesekezha nayuma 
hashindamena Competence Based Curriculum yafwilaña kunuñañesha 
kutaña hela ntañilu nayuma yayeni yamwekanaña mukuhanda. 
Yuma yamboka yinakukuhwelelewa atudizi kwilukisha yinasonekewi 
mumukanda wa Nloñeshelu yayuma yikutañishewaña mumashikola 
amunu mu Zambia, Zambia Curriculum Framework mu Chizungu, yamu 
2023, yinakundami kuyuma yidi imu mumukanda.  
Iwu mukanda wunakufwila kukwasha antañishi wenawa kuzata nyidimu 
yawu kwesekezha nanloñeshelu ya Competence Based Curriculum, 
hampinji yikunabuli nyikanda yakuzatisha yetezhewa. 
Dichi wunakumwesha kudihana chikupu kwamutayi wanfulumendi 
weniwu kwakufwila kubula kukolesha nzatilu yawantañishi.  
Hela chochu, antañishi anakoleshewi kubombelahu haniyi yuma 
yinasonekewi muniwu mukanda, kusanda-sanda nakuwana wunsahu 
nukuzatishahu nzhila zhikwawu zhahachawu nakwila yuma kulonda 
kumanisha kukala kudi kwezhima kunatweshi kuwanawu munzatilu 
yanyidimu yawu muniyi nloñeshelu. 
 
Nakuhweleli nami antañishi akuwuzatisha iwu mukanda wakuyikwasha 
munzhila yayiwahi. 
 
Kelvin Mambwe (Dr.) 
Permanent Secretary – Educational Services 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

4 
 
KUSAKILILA   
Iwu Mukanda Wakulombola Ntañishi hamwakutañishila atudizi amu Fomu 
1 Litilicha wunasonekewi kuhitila mukuhumañana-humañana 
nakuhanjeka nanowu ezhima akwatahu makasa hansañu zhamashikola. 
Kwadiñi kuhumañana nawantu, mazanvu ninyitayi yamboka kulonda 
kutambula yitoñozhoka yawu hantanjikilu yantañilu yamu Fomu 1 Litilicha 
nakuyinka nawa mpinji yakushimuna munatoñozhokuwu hela munafwili 
kumonawu muniwu mukanda. Hakachi kawu hadiñi; Antañishi 
amumashikola awatudizi anyanya nakulaku dehi, Antañishi kufuma ku 
mashikola Ansukula na Muñoñi, Mazanvu emenañaku yuma yamboka 
yatañishewaña mumashikola, Nyitayi yadimena yabula kukundama 
kunfulumendi nizanvu damatuña akwashaña ituña da Zambia. 
Mukukunkulula, nalemeshi nyidimu nikudihana kwawa nkoñi kuchibalu 
cha Curriculum Development Centre, azatili nañovu nakumona chikupu 
neyi mudimu wezhima wakundama kukusoneka kwaniwu Mukanda 
Wakulombola Antañishi wunazatewi nakushika kunsa. 
 
 
Charles Ndakala (Dr.) 
Director - Curriculum Development 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

2023, 
yazhakutañisha atudizi Idimi da Lunda yetezhewa, yemena hakumona 
neyi atudizi anelukishi kwila yuma yinakukuhwelelewawu kuzata. 
Mukanda weniwu wunafwili kukehesha kukala kwafuma hakubula 
kwanyikanda yakuzatisha yetezhewa nakukwasha nawa antañishi 
nayuma yayeni yakuzatisha, zhakwila nizha kweseka nachi atudizi 
zhaloñeshewa kweseka nachipimu chawu muntañilu niyuma yinatweshi 
kukeñekawu. 
Wunu mutayi wanfulumendi, weluka kukala kukwinza nakuhimpa 
nikutachika nloñeshelu yantañilu yayiha yinemeni hakumona neyi atudizi 
anelukishi yuma yinakukuhwelelewa mudi wena. Kutonda nloñeshelu ya 
Competence Based Curriculum (CBC) diku kutachika kwachintampu 
chakuya kumbidi mukulumbulwisha kushikilamu nakulema kwantañilu. 
 
MWATELA KUWUZATISHILA IWU MUKANDA 
Muniwu mukanda mudi yuma yezhima yatela kutañishewa mu Temu 2 
yamu Fomu 1 Litilicha. Hampinji yakuloñesha nakusoneka yuma 
yakutañisha 
mundizilu, 
watela 
kusakula 
yuma 
yalema 
yiwatela 
kushinshikahu niyuma hela nyidimu nawa yiwukukeña atudizi kwila hela 
kuzata hachuma hichuma chinakukuhwelelewawu kwilukisha. Dichi, 
ndizilu yikwikala hela yinatweshi kwikala nayuma yakubadika hadi chimu 
yinakukuhwelelewawu atudizi kwilukisha. Hela chochu, watela kutonda 
chibalu chinatweshi kukeñekewa mpinji yeneni munoyu ndizilu. Cheñi 
nawa, nyidimu hela zhakwila zhinahanewi hadi chuma hichuma 
chinakukuhwelelewawu atudizi kwilukisha hiyinafuukulewi kumanishewa 
mundizilu yimuku. Izhi zhinatweshi kuzatewa mundizilu zhamboka. 
NZHILA YAKUTAÑISHILAMU YINAFUUKULEWI 
Mpinji himpinji yiwunakutañisha, watela kuzatisha nukulondela zhinzhila 
zhakutañishilamu atudizi zhamboka-mboka. Dichi, wunatweshi kuzatisha 
zhinzhila zhimu hakachi kanizhi: 
 Kuhema yisela (Role-play).

6 
 
 Kuzata nyidimu yamboka-mboka kuhitila mukuhema yisela 
(kuhema-hema yisela yamboka/ drama). 
 Kusanda-sanda nakuwana wunsahu walala hanyitu yansañu 
yamboka-mboka (Research). 
 Kutaña kuhitila mukukeña-keña kulonda kuwana wunsahu walala 
hanyitu yansañu yamboka-mboka (Discovery). 
 Kutaña kuhitila mukuhanjeka (Discussion). 
 Kusoneka nsañu zhazhila (Short Stories). 
 Kutuña zhinsañu, tuyisela nizhakutañisha zhikwawu kuzatisha 
kompiyuta. 
Kubombelahu, kwekala nawa nitutufuta tukwawu twakutañishilamu 
twatela kuzatishayi ntañishi hakwila yatweshi kutañisha atudizi amboka-
mboka awanikaña mukilasi yatañishañayi. Antañishi eluka tuyisela-sela 
twatuvulu kwesekezha nanochu chayitañishawu mukudiza kwawu 
kumashikola amuñoñi (College).

MUTU WANSAÑU 1: LITILICHA YAKUSHIMUNA 
Kulumbulula 
Iwu mutu wansañu wunakuya nakushinshika ha Litilicha yakushimuna. 
Litilicha yakushimuna hinsañu yinasendewi kufuma ikiñu dimu nakuya 
mwikiñu dikwawu. Litilicha yakushimuna yekala muyedi; yakulumbisha 
(nsañu yabula kuyamwekeneni) nayakubula kulumbisha (nsañu yalala). 
Munichi chibalu antu akutaña akuwanamu mutu wansañu, mutu 
wansañu wanyaya hamu ninyidimu. Nyidimu yidimu yinasonekewi 
nakuyimwekesha 
neyi 
kwiluka 
kwila 
chuma, 
chipimu 
chanzatilu 
chinakuhwelelewi hamu nizhakwila atudizi. 
 
 Chuma chinakukuhwelelewa atudizi kwilukisha 
Hanyima yakutaña chibalu chansañu chenichi, atudizi amwekeshi 
kwiluka; 
- 
Nyidimu ya Litilicha yakushimuna. 
- 
Mwawanikilaña ninomu mwekalila nyidimu ya Litilicha yakushimuna. 
- 
Kumwekesha walala hansañu yanyidimu ya Litilicha yakushimuna. 
- 
Kulumbulula nakashinshi chikupu nyidimu ya Litilicha yakushimuna. 
 Kukoka yitoñozhoka yawatudizi  
- 
Embi kamina kamukaanda kelukawu lufuchi-lufuchi.

Mutu wansañu wanyanya 1: Nyidimu yanyichidi ya Litilicha yakushimuna. 
Iwu mutu wansañu wanyanya 1, wunakutala hanyidimu yanyichidi ya 
Litilicha yakushimuna. Munichi chibalu, atudizi akudiza nyidimu yanyichidi 
ya Litilicha yakushimuna. 
 Chuma chinakukuhwelelewa atudizi kwilukisha 
- 
Amwekeshi hatoka nyidimu yanyichidi ya Litilicha yakushimuna. 
 
 Yikuyuñulu 
- 
Nyikanda yasonekawu yishimu (Tuheka twawa Lunda). 
- 
Chati hadi yishimu ya Lunda. 
Yuma yalema yakulumbulula hakutañisha 
Litilicha yakushimuna yekala muyedi: 
- 
Yakulumbisha (kushimuna nsañu yinabuli kwikalaku). 
- 
Yakubula 
kulumbisha 
(yinakushimuna 
nsañu 
hadi 
yuma 
yamwekanaña). 
Zhakwila 
i. 
Ntañishi 
- 
Yambuli atudizi mumazanvu awana, ahanjiki hanyidimu yanyichidi 
ya Litilicha yakushimuna.  
- 
Lombolaku atudizi mukuhituluka muyuma yinadiziwu. 
ii. 
Atudizi

yakushimuna. 
- 
Ahituluki muyuma yinadiziwu.

Mudimu 1

Sonekaku nakutanjika nyidimu yanyichidi yitanu ya Litilicha. 
 
 Chipimu chanzatilu chinakuhwelelewi 
Nyidimu 
yanyichidi 
ya 
Litilicha 
yakushimuna 
yinatanjikewi 
mwawanina. 
- 
Hakwila wumoni neyi nyidimu ya Litilicha yakushimuna ninomu 
muyekalila munatanjikewi mwawanina, yihuli atudizi malwihu 
amboka haniwu mutu wansañu. Anukaku neyi kweseka kweniku 
kunatweshi kwikalaku hampinji yinakutañawu nihakumanisha. 
- 
Hakachi kanzhila zhiwunatweshi kuzatisha kwesekelamu atudizi hadi, 
kuyinka mudimu wakuzata hadi mpinji yayilehi, nyidimu yakuzata 
nakuyimwekesha nakweseka kwakusoneka.

  Kadizi wumu asoneki habodi ozhu zhidi nakwakulawu akwawu

literature. Learners will be able to recognize similarities and differences among the three 
forms of written literature and develop the skill of decision making. Class discussion, 
question and answer, group discussion will be used to execute the lesson. This is the first 
lesson in the series of three lessons.
